ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song is part of */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre(s) of the song */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the song for sale */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the song */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song (format: mm:ss) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for unique identification of songs */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the song */,
  "song_type" TEXT /* Type of song (e.g., single, album track) */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "digital_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released digitally */,
  "physical_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released physically */,
  "is_digital_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is available only in digital format */,
  "is_physical_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is available only in physical format */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is featured on the platform */,
  "featured_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was featured */,
  "license_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license agreement for the song */,
  "royalty_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of royalty for the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_license_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_agreement_id") REFERENCES license_agreements ("license_agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the artist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that published the album */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the album */,
  "total_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the album (format: mm:ss) */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_soundtrack" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a soundtrack */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a live recording */,
  "is_digital_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is available only in digital format */,
  "is_physical_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is available only in physical format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the producer */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the producer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_agreements" (
  "license_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license agreement */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song the agreement is for */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., mechanical, synchronization) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the license agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the license agreement */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the license agreement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license agreement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license agreement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_collaborations" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "artist_id")
)
